message:
feat(search): add two-tier search benchmark harness and fix unused Result warnings in contacts TUI tests

Two logical changes:

1. Search benchmark infrastructure (mcp-agent-mail-search-core):
   - Add criterion benchmark harness (two_tier_bench.rs) for the semantic
     two-tier search engine, gated behind the "semantic" feature
   - Add criterion and half as dev-dependencies in Cargo.toml
   - Register [[bench]] target with harness=false
   - Update Cargo.lock with new dependency metadata

2. TUI contacts test fix (mcp-agent-mail-server):
   - Suppress unused Result warnings in contacts.rs tests by binding
     push_event() return values with let _ = ..., matching the pattern
     used elsewhere in the test suite

3. Beads tracker state updates (timestamp refreshes on active issues)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -62,6 +62,13 @@ hybrid = ["tantivy-engine", "semantic"]
 [dev-dependencies]
 tempfile.workspace = true
 tantivy.workspace = true
+criterion.workspace = true
+half.workspace = true
+
+[[bench]]
+name = "two_tier_bench"
+harness = false
+required-features = ["semantic"]
 
 [lints]
 workspace = true
